title: Execution Intent
description: A declarative request for AI execution submitted to the Summit control plane.

intent_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution intent.

agent_ref.description: Reference to the agent identity requested to perform the execution.

requester_ref.description: Reference to the identity of the service or user requesting the execution.

objective.description: The goal or prompt to be executed.

tool_refs.description: List of tools requested for this execution.

data_class.description: Data classification level of the inputs.

budget_ref.description: Reference to the budget to be consumed.

max_cost_usd.description: Maximum allowed cost for this execution in USD.

deterministic_mode.description: Whether the execution must run in a deterministic mode (e.g. for CI or evidence).
